points.title: An onion site accessible over Tor is provided

case.title: An onion site accessible over Tor is provided
case.description: Tor is a software for anonymous communication that directs Internet traffic through an overlay network. Onion sites are only available through Tor browser and provide additional security and anonymity to users.

points.title: The terms for this service are easy to read

case.title: The terms for this service are easy to read
case.description: The Agreements are well-organised, define legal terms (where applicable), aren't needlessly long and may be pleasant to read.

points.title: There is a date of the last update of the agreements

case.title: There is a date of the last update of the agreements
case.description: The given text has a date that allows to know when it was last updated.

points.title: The service is only available in some countries approved by its government

case.title: The service is only available in some countries approved by its government
case.description: Countries under embargo or banned by the government of the country in question cannot use the service.

points.title: You maintain ownership of your content

case.title: You maintain ownership of your content
case.description: This service does not claim ownership over user-generated content or materials, and the user doesn't need to waive any moral rights by posting owned content.

points.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content

case.title: The service has non-exclusive use of your content
case.description: The service can pay for your content and you are allowed to make it commercially available to other services/parties.

points.title: Your content can be licensed to third parties

case.title: Your content can be licensed to third parties
case.description: By posting content through the Services, users grant them a transferable and/or sublicensable right, which allows user content to be licensed to third parties.

points.title: Your content can be distributed through any media known now or in the future

case.title: Your content can be distributed through any media known now or in the future

points.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you

case.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you
case.description: If the Government governing the Terms requests personal data of a user of this service, they may not inform/notify the user while complying with the request.

points.title: This service informs you that its Terms of Service does not apply to third party websites

case.title: This service informs you that its Terms of Service does not apply to third-party services
case.description: The service states that whenever it links to third party websites or applications, its Terms of Service does not apply. Those third party websites or applications hosted or operated by other organizations may have their Terms of Service.

points.title: Other applicable rules, terms, conditions or guidelines

case.title: Other applicable rules, terms, conditions or guidelines
case.description: Use of the service is subject also to an exhaustive list of other documents containing rules, guidelines, terms or policies (in addition to the obvious Terms of Service/Terms of Use and Privacy Policy/Data Use Policy)

points.title: You must create an account to use this service

case.title: You must create an account to use this service
case.description: You must provide the service with your information in order to use it

points.title: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for the activities on your account

case.title: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account and for the activities on your account
case.description: You are responsible for protecting the confidentiality of your password and for maintaining the security of your account. Any activity occurring under your account is your responsibility, whether authorized by you or not.

points.title: If you offer suggestions to the service, they become the owner of the ideas that you give them

case.title: If you offer suggestions to the service, they become the owner of the ideas that you give them
case.description: The service can claim ownership on feedback, proposals, ideas and suggestions submitted by the users, who may waive their "moral rights" on that feedback.

points.title: You are prohibited from sending chain letters, junk mail, spam or any unsolicited messages

case.title: You are prohibited from sending chain letters, junk mail, spam or any unsolicited messages
case.description: Users are not allowed to use the service for chain letters, junk mail, spamming or any other distribution of content to people who have not agreed to receiving it.

points.title: This service does not guarantee that it or the products obtained through it meet your expectations or requirements

case.title: This service does not guarantee that it or the products obtained through it meet your expectations or requirements
case.description: This service provider informs its users that the services, information, products, or other materials provided on its website may not meet the users' expectations or requirements.

points.title: The service provider makes no warranty regarding uninterrupted, timely, secure or error-free service

case.title: The service provider makes no warranty regarding uninterrupted, timely, secure or error-free service
case.description: The service provider expressly does not claim to provide uninterrupted, timely, secure or error-free service.

points.title: Minors must have the authorization of their legal guardians to use the service

case.title: Minors must have the authorization of their legal guardians to use the service
case.description: Minors must have the authorization of their legal guardians to use the services. The legal guardians are responsible for the use of the service by the minor.

points.title: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes

case.title: You agree not to use the service for illegal purposes
case.description: The user agrees not to commit any unlawful acts through the use of the website, including the posting of illegal content or messaging.

points.title: You are informed about the risk of publishing personal info online

case.title: You are informed about the risk of publishing personal info online

points.title: Your content can be deleted if you violate the terms

case.title: Your content can be deleted if you violate the terms
case.description: Content infringing the Terms of Service (or the Acceptable Use Policy or equivalent)  may be removed, with or without notice.

points.title: If you are the target of a copyright claim, your content may be removed

case.title: If you are the target of a copyright claim, your content may be removed
case.description: The content you have published on the service may be removed if it infringes copyright.

points.title: A free help desk is provided

case.title: A free help desk is provided
case.description: The service can be easily contacted for questions or provides a support center at no extra cost.

points.title: Content you post may be edited by the service for any reason

case.title: Content you post may be edited by the service for any reason
case.description: This service can edit any content on the service for whatever the reason and at their sole discretion.

points.title: Terms may be changed any time at their discretion, without notice to you

case.title: Terms may be changed any time at their discretion, without notice to you
case.description: The Agreements can be updated at any time, including in a way that negatively affects user rights, without notifying before or after the changes.

points.title: They may stop providing the service at any time

case.title: They may stop providing the service at any time
case.description: They may discontinue the services without prior notice, at any time, for any or no reason. They usually assume no liability for losses and damages resulting from this suspension.

points.title: Specific content can be deleted without reason and may be removed without prior notice

case.title: Specific content can be deleted without reason and may be removed without prior notice
case.description: This service can delete specific content. Usually they will claim they reserve the right to do it at their sole discretion, which is legalese for saying they won't give a specific reason. If the terms say they will not notify you, it shall be included in the quote but if it does not explicitly say they will give you a notice, it can be reasonably inferred that they can do it without telling you.

points.title: Two factor authentication is provided for your account

case.title: Two factor authentication is provided for your account
case.description: The service provides means of further securing your account with two factor authentification, thus greatly improving account security.

points.title: This service assumes no liability for unauthorized access to your personal information

case.title: This service assumes no liability for unauthorized access to your personal information

points.title: You cannot distribute or disclose your account to third parties

case.title: You cannot distribute or disclose your account to third parties
case.description: In this context third-parties refers to anyone including friends, family, or company

points.title: Spidering, crawling, or accessing the site through any automated means is not allowed

case.title: Spidering, crawling, or accessing the site through any automated means is not allowed

points.title: You have the right to leave this service at any time

case.title: You have the right to leave this service at any time
case.description: You can stop using the service and/or cancel or delete your account at any time for any reason. Moreover, the termination is reasonably fast and simple.

points.title: User accounts can be terminated after having been in breach of the terms of service repeatedly

case.title: User accounts can be terminated after having been in breach of the Terms of Service repeatedly
case.description: User accounts can be terminated for having been in breach of the terms of service repeatedly, meaning they cannot be terminated without a reason, but only for a limited number of reasons. Additionally, user accounts will not be deleted after a first infringement.

points.title: The service suspends your account after inactivity for a certain or uncertain time

case.title: The service suspends your account after inactivity for a certain or uncertain time

points.title: Your account can be suspended for several reasons

case.title: Your account can be suspended for several reasons

points.title: Your account can be deleted or permanently suspended without prior notice and without a reason

case.title: Your account can be deleted or permanently suspended without prior notice and without a reason
case.description: At any time, your account can be terminated without explanation and without warning by the service.

points.title: Defend, indemnify, hold harmless; survives termination

case.title: Defend, indemnify, hold harmless; survives termination

points.title: The service is provided 'as is' and to be used at your sole risk

case.title: The service is provided 'as is' and to be used at your sole risk
case.description: This service does not provide any guarantees as to its usability or fitness for the users' purposes. Users agree to use it at their own risk, accepting any possible bugs, malfunctions or harm to their devices.

points.title: The service does not guarantee accuracy or reliability of the information provided

case.title: The service does not guarantee accuracy or reliability of the information provided
case.description: This service makes no warranty regarding the accuracy or reliability of any information that is given on its website or the results that may be obtained from the use of the service.

points.title: You are responsible for any risks, damages, or losses that may incur by downloading materials

case.title: You are responsible for any risks, damages, or losses that may incur by downloading materials
case.description: Users are responsible for any harm to their computer system or loss of data they may incur through the download of materials from the service.

points.title: The service assumes no liability for any damages the user incurs

case.title: The service assumes no liability for any damages the user incurs
case.description: The service assumes no liability for any damages the user incurs, including tangible (e.g. profits) and intangible losses (e.g. data), resulting from the use or inability to use the service or any other matter relating to the service.

points.title: You aren’t forced into binding arbitration in case of disputes

case.title: You aren’t forced into binding arbitration in case of disputes
case.description: Binding Arbitration is a dispute resolution method involving a neutral third party which will render a decision instead of going to court. Since the arbitrator can decide the outgoing of a dispute without evidences or a legal basis, it is preferable that users decide whether they want or not their dispute to be resolved this way.

points.title: This service assumes no liability for unauthorized access to your personal information

case.title: This service assumes no liability for unauthorized access to your personal information

points.title: Any liability on behalf of the service is only limited to the fees you paid as a user

case.title: Any liability on behalf of the service is only limited to the fees you paid as a user

points.title: Your use is throttled

case.title: Your use is throttled
case.description: The service may impose limits or restrictions to the use of the service, thus negatively impacting users experience. They may do so without reason or prior notice.

points.title: The terms may be changed at any time, but you will receive notification of the changes

case.title: The terms may be changed at any time, but you will receive notification of the changes
case.description: The Terms may be updated without prior notice, but users will be notified of the changes at the moment they will start applying.

points.title: Instead of asking directly, this Service will assume your consent to changes of terms merely from your usage

case.title: Instead of asking directly, this Service will assume your consent to changes of terms merely from your usage
case.description: The Service infers your acceptance from your continued usage, instead of prompting you to read the new Terms and asking for direct consent. This doesn’t apply to services that have no way to seek consent from users through their contact details or an account.

points.title: The court of law governing the terms is in Texas, U.S.A.

case.title: The court of law governing the terms is in location X
case.description: The Terms are governed by the applicable laws of a jurisdiction (specified in the title of each point by replacing the "X").

points.title: The court of law governing the terms is in a jurisdiction that is less friendly to user privacy protection (Texas, U.S.A.)

case.title: The court of law governing the terms is in a jurisdiction that is less friendly to user privacy protection
case.description: The Terms are governed by the applicable laws of a jurisdiction known for weak data regulations and poor user privacy protection. Usually contributors will need to explain in the Analysis view of each point linked to this Case the reason why it shall be applied.

points.title: Information is provided about what kind of information they collect

case.title: Information is provided about what kind of personal information is collected
case.description: The Privacy Policy describes in detail the data collected through the website and through the services provided.

points.title: Pseudonyms are allowed

case.title: Pseudonyms are allowed
case.description: You don't need to provide your full name to use the Service and you are allowed to use a pseudonym instead.

points.title: Your biometric data is collected

case.title: Your biometric data is collected
case.description: This service can collect or use your biometric data. This includes but is not limited to facial recognition, fingerprints, and iris scans. Although this feature can sometimes be convenient to the user, providing this type of information to the service could open your personal data to being sold or stolen.

points.title: Many different types of personal data are collected

case.title: Many different types of personal data are collected
case.description: The service collects different kinds of personal data, such as name, demographic information, postal address, biometric data, device information, IDs, contacts, call logs...

points.title: You waive your right to a class action

case.title: You waive your right to a class action
case.description: The right to be represented in a class action (or representative action) exists in the US and some European countries. It allows people who have been similarly injured by the same accused to take legal action by a single lawsuit instead of individually. Some Terms of Service try to limit that right. By agreeing to them, you could waive (= renounce to) your right to a class action, which might reduce your chances to be successful in a case.

points.title: Invalidity of any portion of the Terms of Service does not entail invalidity of its remainder

case.title: Invalidity of any portion of the Terms of Service does not entail invalidity of its remainder
case.description: Should any portion of the Terms of Service be unenforceable or invalid, that portion will be enforced to the fullest extent permitted by applicable law and the remainder of the TOS will remain valid and enforceable.

points.title: Failure to enforce any provision of the Terms of Service does not constitute a waiver of such provision

case.title: Failure to enforce any provision of the Terms of Service does not constitute a waiver of such provision
case.description: Even if the service does not or not always enforce all of the rules or provisions contained in its terms, they still apply. Users can at a later time still be held accountable for violating provisions that have not been enforced consistently.

points.title: The terms for this service are translated into different languages

case.title: The terms for this service are translated into different languages
case.description: Although there's generally a unique binding language for the terms, they are translated to allow all users to understand the agreement they're accepting, no matter their native language.

points.title: Archives of their agreements are provided so that changes can be viewed over time

case.title: Archives of their agreements are provided so that changes can be viewed over time
case.description: This case applies to Services whose agreements provide previous versions, so that users can compare them and understand how the Service seems to evolve regarding user rights.

points.title: You are being tracked via social media cookies/pixels

case.title: You are being tracked via social media cookies/pixels
case.description: These types of cookies/pixels send information to social media sites when you interact with the service.

points.title: This service may collect, use, and share location data

case.title: Location data may be collected, used and/or shared
case.description: Location-based information is collected and may be used and/or shared with third parties for purposes not directly related to the services provided (i.e. the Service doesn't rely on the use or share of location data to function properly).

points.title: Private messages can be read

case.title: Private messages can be read
case.description: The Service is able to access, scan, review or read all user communications, including private messages, which may contain personal or sensitive data.

points.title: Tracking pixels are used in service-to-user communication

case.title: Tracking pixels are used in service-to-user communication
case.description: The service tracks the user count or some actions of the user; this is usually used for statistics. For example, emails sent by a service can contain a pixel tag, which is a small, clear image that can tell them whether or not you have opened an email and what your IP address is.

points.title: Third parties are involved in operating the service

case.title: Third parties are involved in operating the service

points.title: Your IP address is collected, which can be used to view your approximate location

case.title: Your IP address is collected, which can be used to view your approximate location

points.title: Your personal data is used for advertising

case.title: Your personal data is used for advertising
case.description: Your interaction with the service and data you have shared with them may be gathered to create an advertising ID or profile to target ads on you, either on the website you were visiting or in third party websites.

points.title: App required for this service requires broad device permissions

case.title: App required for this service requires broad device permissions
case.description: The app of the service requires more device permissions than necessary. As a consequence it can compromise your privacy by accessing many functions and information from your device, such as precise location, contacts, device identifiers etc.

points.title: This service receives your precise location through GPS coordinates

case.title: This service receives your precise location through GPS coordinates
case.description: Unless the service relies on Geo Location, this case is to be assigned to points that don't need your GPS coordinates to function properly.

points.title: They store data on you even if you did not interact with the service

case.title: Your data is collected even if you did not interact with the service directly
case.description: Some services store data on you even if you did not provide that data yourself. For example, users might provide access to their address book, after which a service might also store the phone numbers of that person's contacts.

points.title: First-party cookies are used

case.title: First-party cookies are used
case.description: First-party cookies only belong to the domain of the service and not a third party.

points.title: Your personal data is used to employ targeted third-party advertising

case.title: Your personal data is used to employ targeted third-party advertising
case.description: Your Personal Information is traded and shared with advertising companies to target ads on you, either on the website you were visiting or in third party websites. Your interaction with the service and data you have shared with them may be gathered to create an advertising ID or profile.

points.title: Your profile is combined across various products

case.title: Your profile is combined across various products
case.description: When using multiple services from one same company, they can combine these (unrelated) information sources about you to build up a single richer user profile about you.

points.title: Information is provided about how your personal data is used

case.title: Information is provided about how your personal data is used
case.description: The Privacy Policy explains the purposes for which data is collected and the way it is processed, used and shared.

points.title: Your personal information is used for many different purposes

case.title: Your personal information is used for many different purposes
case.description: Personal Data can be processed for many reasons, including non essential processing such as for advertising, marketing and analytics purposes.

points.title: Your personal data is aggregated into statistics

case.title: Your personal data is aggregated into statistics
case.description: Your personal data is used for statistics in a de-identified/aggregated form (i.e. not directly linked to a unique identity) to analyse trends, for research and for analytics.

points.title: This service tracks you on other websites

case.title: You may be tracked on other websites
case.description: The service may use tracking technologies in third-party websites to track your online activity while you aren't visiting their Site.

points.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties

case.title: Information is gathered about you through third parties
case.description: This Service may employ, either identifiable or non-identifiable, data collection from third party sources about you.

points.title: Third-party cookies are used for advertising

case.title: Third-party cookies are used for advertising
case.description: The service's website sets third-party cookies (cookies that do not belong to their domain) for purposes not including statistics and analytics.

points.title: Your personal data is used for automated decision-making, profiling or AI training

case.title: Your personal data is used for automated decision-making, profiling or AI training
case.description: Personal data or content you share with the service may be processed to make decisions by automated means without human involvement. This includes profiling, which is any form of automated processing of your information to analyse or predict things like your economic situation, health, personal preferences or interests; as well as Artificial Intelligence training.

points.title: Your provided identifiable information is actively checked by the service

case.title: Your provided identifiable information is actively checked by the service
case.description: The service checks if the required identifiable information you've provided is correct, and may do so on a regular basis. The check measures could be analyzing your browser information and/or providing the identifiable information to a third-party or the authority, thus compromising your anonymity.

points.title: Your personal data may be used for marketing purposes

case.title: Your personal data may be used for marketing purposes
case.description: The service may use your personal data for marketing, such as sending you personalised offerings.

points.title: This service shares your personal data with third parties that are not essential to its operation

case.title: This service shares your personal data with third parties that are not essential to its operation
case.description: Your personal data is or may be given to third parties nonessential to the service’s operation. This could be a business partner that receives your data to provide targeted advertisements.

points.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you

case.title: Your personal data may be disclosed to comply with government requests without notice to you
case.description: If the Government governing the Terms requests personal data of a user of this service, they may not inform/notify the user while complying with the request.

points.title: Your provided identifiable information is actively checked by the service

case.title: Your provided identifiable information is actively checked by the service
case.description: The service checks if the required identifiable information you've provided is correct, and may do so on a regular basis. The check measures could be analyzing your browser information and/or providing the identifiable information to a third-party or the authority, thus compromising your anonymity.

points.title: Your personal data may be sold or otherwise transferred as part of a bankruptcy proceeding or other type of financial transaction

case.title: Your personal data may be sold or otherwise transferred as part of a bankruptcy proceeding or other type of financial transaction
case.description: If the service gets acquired or is involved in a merger, bankruptcy, reorganisation or sale, your personal data may be transferred or sold.

points.title: Banned users are prohibited from creating a new account

case.title: Banned users are prohibited from creating a new account
case.description: Once users have been permanently banned from this service, they are not allowed to create a new account to keep using the service.

points.title: You can request access, correction and/or deletion of your data

case.title: You can request access, correction and/or deletion of your data
case.description: Users have the right to access personal data hold by the Service, correct it and/or permanently delete it. This usually applies to Services GDPR compliants.

points.title: Some personal data may be kept for business interests or legal obligations

case.title: Some personal data may be kept for business interests or legal obligations
case.description: After the end of the data retention period and/or if you request the deletion of your data, they may still keep it for business interests (fraud detection, transactions...) or legal obligations (tax, legal reporting...)

points.title: You can retrieve an archive of your data

case.title: You can retrieve an archive of your data
case.description: Users can request a copy of the data collected through the services and infer from it the amount of personal information that is processed and stored by the Service. This usually applies to Services GDPR compliants.

points.title: You can limit how your information is used by third-parties and the service

case.title: You can limit how your information is used by third parties and the service
case.description: Usually it's related to the right to object to data processing or restrict it under the GDPR. Users may be able to refuse the use of their data for marketing purposes for instance.

points.title: Your personal data is not sold

case.title: Your personal data is not sold
case.description: This service makes an explicit promise not to sell "personal data" of users.

points.title: Your data may be processed and stored anywhere in the world

case.title: Your data may be processed and stored anywhere in the world
case.description: Your data is stored all over the world, including in countries where data protection rules may differ from the ones of the service's jurisdiction or those of your country jurisdiction.

points.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data

case.title: A complaint mechanism is provided for the handling of personal data
case.description: The service provides users with contact information for an internal or external structure to lodge complaints. It also provides users with contact information for a higher data protection / privacy office in case the internal mechanism fails to satisfy the user.

points.title: The service claims to be CCPA compliant for California users

case.title: The service claims to be CCPA compliant for California users
case.description: The service has a different behavior towards users protected by the California Consumer Privacy Act.

points.title: This service is only available to users over 13 years old

case.title: This service is only available to users over a certain age
case.description: The Services are intended for users who are at least a certain age. If you are younger than the age required then you are prohibited from using the Service.

points.title: The service reviews its privacy policy on a regular basis

case.title: The service reviews its Privacy Policy on a regular basis
case.description: Users know the date the privacy policy was last updated and can thus infer the next time it will be reviewed. This gives users more certainty about how long they can trust the current policy to apply.

points.title: This service does not condone any ideas contained in its user-generated contents

case.title: This service does not condone any ideas contained in its user-generated contents

points.title: Instructions are provided on how to submit a copyright claim

case.title: Instructions are provided on how to submit a copyright claim
case.description: If content that you own is copied or made accessible through the service in a way that constitutes an intellectual property right infringement, you can report it following the instructions given in the agreements.

points.title: Separate policies are employed for different parts of the service

case.title: Separate policies are employed for different parts of the service
case.description: The user may need to read additional product-specific agreements depending on the way the service is used.

points.title: You are prohibited from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems

case.title: You are prohibited from attempting to gain unauthorized access to other computer systems
case.description: The service does not allow any attempts at hacking or otherwise gaining unauthorized access to other users' computers.

points.title: Service fines users for Terms of Service violations

case.title: Service fines users for Terms of Service violations
case.description: Service fines users for violating provisions in the Terms of Service

points.title: You have a reduced time period to take legal action against the service

case.title: You have a reduced time period to take legal action against the service
case.description: If you wish to bring legal action against a service about a past incident, you may not be able to do so if the Terms you agreed to implied a limited amount of time. As a result it may be worthy to carefully read that section of the Terms to know exactly how much time you might have before your right to take legal action expires.

points.title: This service tracks which web page referred you to it

case.title: This service tracks which web page referred you to it
case.description: The service logs the URL of the last web page you visited before visiting the Site and may use that information to gather more data about you.

points.title: This Service provides a list of Third Parties involved in its operation

case.title: This Service provides a list of third parties involved in its operation
case.description: The Service provides a list detailing the third parties involved, their roles, and may even provide more information.
